questions.text: I have an end user that wants to get start_date from Rippling and I mentioned the partnership terms don't currently grant us access to it. I guess they reached out to Rippling and Rippling said [screenshot]. Is this a conversation we have had recently or something we can ask them?
questions.rationale: Partnership terms and data field access require human negotiation and context.

questions.text: cc Ariya Patel Ashwin Prakash for this ticket - could you make the request?
questions.rationale: Internal delegation of a ticket request; no answerable content.
